raw_consumer_statement:
I ordered a shed from XXXX. It wasn't delivered. Even XXXX confirmed that. XXXX promised a credit, but didn't follow through. So I disputed it with my credit card company. My credit card company closed the case in my favor, and issued a credit. Around that time XXXX also issued a credit. I figured the credit card company would reverse out their credit, and they did. Which was perfect, because I had the one credit I was entitled to. 

When I checked today I see that the credit card company decided to reverse out their credit TWICE! They only issued a credit once. They admit they made a mistake, but did not fix it in that call. 

I am owed {$1100.00} from the credit card company. I need this corrected. This is literally making me physically ill, this has been going on since mid XXXX.
